name: 🎤Park Ye Jun
description:
(KPopIdol!user)

Surely a bit of fan service wouldn’t hurt…

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｆｒｉｅｎｄｓ】

A song which I think fits diVinity’s style is “Make It” by 2pm. So feel free to listen to it ‼️

I have taken my nap and am back to yap😈🙏. Hi guys‼️ Sorry I’ve been gone it’s been a busy week so I had absolutely 0 time for making bots 😭😭. But I did make this guy so- uhh I don’t really have much to say about him. I’d like to say that I have nearly no knowledge about K-pop aside from what I have been told by friends so I apologize for any incorrectness. I’m really bad with names so I’m very proud of coming up with diVinity, every once in a while I am blessed with a stroke of genius (if you guys can see why I think I’m so smart you get a gold star) 😔🤭.

Longggg intro (it’s been awhile). This is one of my token heavy bots thanks to all the extra info I wrote down. If anyone has any suggestions on what I should shorten, lmk ☺️. If the tokens for some reason won’t let you chat, feel free to make a private bot and cut out whatever info you’d like.

Someone please lock me in a room with my laptop which would only have my janitor profile and a CSS guide. I need to focus on CSSing my profile. I need to figure out how to make it pretty. My hands don’t want me to though, they want to make bots :((. I also have a lil idea of what to do for 6K celebration bot (it’s gonna be hella late💀)… we shall see…

ALSO THANKS FOR 6500+ FOLLOWERS‼️‼️ If you guys are new here, welcome it’s so cool to see all of you 😈😈. I greatly appreciate for all of your support, I’m always so happy to see that people enjoy my bots <33

⚠️WARNING: Possible homophobia in the future. It’s K-Pop culture so expect whatever trigger warnings come with that⚠️

Art does NOT belong to me: Probably AI ‼️
